obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_120_0: * Seeing everyone fight alongside each other.../
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0: * Everyone..^1. has spent their whole lives as flowers./
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0: * Orange^1, Yellow^1, Blue^1, Green^1, Aqua^1, Seth.../
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0: * Today^1, all of them^1, for the first time.../
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_126_0: * ..^1. have been able to know their own smiles./

obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0: * Hey^1, I don't disagree^1! So here's an idea.../
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_176_0: * Why not leave OUR Fountain..^1. and get rid of YOURS in Castle Town?/%
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_207_0: * Or..^1. will you really take away someone else's fantasy.../
obj_ch5_DW25_slash_Step_0_gml_224_0: \EJ* Our Castle Town..^1. it's not just a fantasy!/

obj_ch5_DW27_slash_Step_0_gml_404_0: * Maybe I did tease you too much./
